styles.container: max-width: 940px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 36px 38px; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.74; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f3f5f7 100%); border-left: 8px solid #bc2d2d; box-shadow: 0 16px 38px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
styles.title: margin: 0 0 24px; font-size: 41px; line-height: 1.08; font-weight: 800; color: #8f1d1d;
styles.image: display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 12px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
styles.row_wrapper: margin: 28px 0; display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: stretch;
styles.row_image: display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 10px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
styles.float_left: float: left; width: 42%; max-width: 350px; margin: 8px 20px 14px 0; display: block; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 12px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
styles.float_right: float: right; width: 42%; max-width: 350px; margin: 8px 0 14px 20px; display: block; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 12px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
